output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>

SELECT (SUM(?sign) AS ?difference)
WHERE {
  {
    ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q6576560; wdt:P1480 wd:Q5773044; wdt:P158 ?driver.
    BIND(1 AS ?sign)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q6576560; wdt:P1480 wd:Q5773045; ps:P158 ?statement.
    ?statement pq:P1897 wd:Q3345365.
    ?statement psv:P158 ?driver.
    BIND(-1 AS ?sign)
  }
